Global Variable# kIMKLocateCandidatesBelowHint

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKLocateCandidatesBelowHint: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimklocatecandidatesbelowhint#Discussion)

Place the candidates window below the start of the current text selection.
